policyname: Executive and above can delete events
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (yi_connect.user_roles ur
     JOIN yi_connect.roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id)))
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (r.hierarchy_level >= 5))))

policyname: Co-Chair and above can create events
with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (yi_connect.user_roles ur
     JOIN yi_connect.roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id)))
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (r.hierarchy_level >= 3))))

policyname: Anyone can view published events in their chapter
qual:
((status = ANY (ARRAY['published'::yi_connect.event_status, 'ongoing'::yi_connect.event_status, 'completed'::yi_connect.event_status])) OR (organizer_id = auth.uid()) OR (auth.uid() = ANY (co_organizers)) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (yi_connect.user_roles ur
     JOIN yi_connect.roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id)))
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (r.hierarchy_level >= 3)))))

policyname: Organizers and Co-Chair+ can update events
qual:
((organizer_id = auth.uid()) OR (auth.uid() = ANY (co_organizers)) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (yi_connect.user_roles ur
     JOIN yi_connect.roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id)))
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (r.hierarchy_level >= 3)))))

policyname: Admins can delete members in their chapter
qual:
((chapter_id IN ( SELECT p.chapter_id
   FROM yi_connect.profiles p
  WHERE (p.id = auth.uid()))) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (yi_connect.user_roles ur
     JOIN yi_connect.roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id)))
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (r.hierarchy_level >= 3)))))

with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (yi_connect.user_roles ur
     JOIN yi_connect.roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id)))
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (r.hierarchy_level >= 3))))

policyname: Users can create their own member record
Members can view members in their chapter
qual:
(chapter_id IN ( SELECT p.chapter_id
   FROM yi_connect.profiles p
  WHERE (p.id = auth.uid())))

policyname: Admins can update members in their chapter
qual:
((chapter_id IN ( SELECT p.chapter_id
   FROM yi_connect.profiles p
  WHERE (p.id = auth.uid()))) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (yi_connect.user_roles ur
     JOIN yi_connect.roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id)))
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (r.hierarchy_level >= 3)))))

policyname: Members can update their own profile
